description:
Specifies the entity which will activate the selected trigger.
*If '''[]''' is given, the trigger is decoupled from the assigned vehicle (example 2). *If the activation source is '''"VEHICLE"''', '''"GROUP"''', '''"LEADER"''' or '''"MEMBER"''', it is changed to '''"NONE"'''. *If '''[vehicle]''' is given, the trigger is coupled to the vehicle or its group. *When the source is '''"GROUP"''', '''"LEADER"''' or '''"MEMBER"''', it is coupled to the group, otherwise it is coupled to the vehicle and the source is changed to '''"VEHICLE"'''.
name: triggerAttachVehicle
